backgroundInformationList.description: Notice of Cancellation of Public Meeting - City-initiated Official Plan Amendment, Zoning By-law Amendment and standalone Zoning By-law pertaining to Inclusionary Zoning

noticeDescription:
CANCELLATION NOTICE

OF PUBLIC MEETING

 

Location of Application: City-wide

 

City-Initiated Official Plan Amendment, Zoning By-law Amendment and standalone Zoning By-law pertaining to Inclusionary Zoning

Applicant: City of Toronto

 

A Notice of Public Meeting was originally sent to you on November 12, 2025.  Please be advised that this application will NOT be considered by the Planning and Housing Committee meeting on December 3, 2025.

 

This Public Meeting has been CANCELLED. You will be notified of any rescheduled date, time and location of the Public Meeting.

 

Compliance with Provincial laws respecting Notice may result in you receiving duplicate notices.
title: Notice of Cancellation of Public Meeting - City-initiated Official Plan Amendment, Zoning By-law Amendment and standalone Zoning By-law pertaining to Inclusionary Zoning
topics: Planning > Refusal of application for a Zoning By-law Amendment
